name: witi-viral-vision
description: AI-powered video factory for Wix stores

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.move:client: shx rm -rf server/dist && shx cp -r client/dist server/dist
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:client && npm run move:client
